search_information.organic_results_state: Some results for exact spelling but showing fixed spelling

text_blocks.snippet: Coffee is a globally popular, brewed beverage made from roasted coffee beans. It is celebrated for its rich flavor and stimulating effects, acting as a natural energy boost. Coffee is highly versatile, consumed steaming hot or chilled over ice, and can be customized with various types of milk and sweeteners.
snippet_highlighted_words: a globally popular, brewed beverage made from roasted coffee beans

list.snippet: Espresso: A concentrated shot of bold coffee that serves as the foundation for most café drinks.
Latte: Espresso combined with steamed milk and topped with a light layer of foam.
Americano: Espresso diluted with hot water for a smooth, black coffee profile.
Cold Brew: Coffee grounds steeped in cold water over many hours, resulting in a smooth, low-acidity, and highly caffeinated drink .

text_blocks.snippet: The taste and texture of your coffee can be adapted to any preference using:

list.snippet: Milk alternatives: Options range from whole milk and half-and-half to plant-based choices like oat, almond, soy, and coconut milk.
Sweeteners & Syrups: Common add-ins include vanilla, caramel, and mocha.

text_blocks.snippet: For a convenient, on-the-go beverage, you can easily pick up canned and bottled coffees. Some top-rated ready-to-drink options include:

list.snippet: Starbucks Frappuccino: A creamy, low-fat blend of coffee and milk that is perfect served chilled.
La Colombe Draft Latte: A canned latte with a frothy layer of silky milk foam, available in flavors like vanilla, mocha, and caramel.

text_blocks.snippet: Check out the Folgers Coffee Guide for a comprehensive look at global styles, or explore at-home espresso and drip recipes on Starbucks at Home.
